description: Imports data from the Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO)
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute; Anthony Castanza, UCSD
plan:
## GEOImporter GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
GEOImporter is a GenePattern module that Imports data from the Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO)

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: Drop.NA.Rows, output.filename
- Optional: GEO.accession, GEO.SOFT.file, data.column.name, ftp.proxy.server, ftp.proxy.username, ftp.proxy.password, http.proxy.server, http.proxy.username, http.proxy.password

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore /GEOImporter/main.R /GEOImporter/ -n<Drop.NA.Rows> -d<data.column.name> -o<output.filename> -a<GEO.accession> -f<GEO.SOFT.file> -1<ftp.proxy.server> -2<ftp.proxy.username> -3<ftp.proxy.password> -4<http.proxy.server> -5<http.proxy.username> -6<http.proxy.password>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/geoimporter\:1

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: GEO.accession
parameters.description: GEO Series record (GSExxx) or a GEO Dataset (GDSxxx). Either a GEO accession or a GEO SOFT file must be given.

parameters.name: GEO.SOFT.file
parameters.description: A previously downloaded GEO SOFT file or its gzipped representation. Either a GEO SOFT file or a GEO accession must be given.

parameters.name: Drop.NA.Rows
parameters.description: Omit rows containing all "NA" values from GSExxx data series.

parameters.name: data.column.name
parameters.description: The name of the column that contains the expression values

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: The name of the output file
